action: Schedule execution of steps 1 to 7 every two hours, track news story till closure, and create an array with timestamp for available metadata.

recipe.steps: Schedule the execution of the complete news workflow (avatar retrieval and assignment, news/script generation, AI video creation, conv_id saving with pending status, periodic status polling, and metadata storage) as a recurring job at the required interval.

For each workflow run: collect and store a metadata object for each genre's video (including genre, avatar, video URL, generation timestamp, and expiry timestamp) into an array using a consistent key.

scheduled_tasks.job_description: Automate the core news video generation flow including avatar assignment, news fetching, script creation, video generation and status updates, and metadata archiving for each completed story.
